faqs.a: Yes, all our surveyors are fully RICS registered.

faqs.q: What is included in a Homebuyer Report?
faqs.a: A Homebuyer Report includes a visual inspection of the property's condition and an assessment of any issues found.

faqs.q: How long does it take to get a survey report?
faqs.a: Typically, you can expect your report within 3-5 working days after the site visit.
We provide prompt service but do not offer emergency surveys. Please book in advance for a scheduled survey.
